title: Karpathy Bigram explained in 10min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code presents a 10-minute explanation of Andrej Karpathy's Bigram Language Model, covering tokenization, embeddings, loss functions, and training with optimizers. The video serves as a foundational tutorial for understanding how language models process tokens before advancing to attention mechanisms and GPT.
writeup: This video walks through Andrej Karpathy's bigram language model as an entry point to understanding GPT and attention mechanisms. It connects the core building blocks: tokenization, embeddings, cross entropy loss, softmax, and the AdamW optimizer. The takeaway is a compact mapping of how these pieces fit together to form a foundation for large language models.
